site.title: Laura Trapp | Traveling Bridal Hair
site.description: On-location bridal hair for weddings and special events. I come to you, so you can get ready in comfort on your big day.

home.sub_bold: Bridal hair that comes to you.
home.sub_rest: I style brides and their parties on location, so the morning of your wedding stays calm, easy, and all about you.

modeling.title: BRIDAL HAIR
modeling.intro: I am a traveling bridal hairstylist. I come to you and style hair for weddings and special events, from the bride to the whole party. Soft waves, classic updos, half-up looks, and everything in between. Tell me about your day and I will help you plan the right look.

acting.title: THE LOOKS
acting.intro: A place to show your favorite bridal looks. Swap in your own photos from the admin panel so brides can see your style before they book.

content-creation.title: FOLLOW ALONG
content-creation.intro: See recent work and behind the scenes on Instagram. It is the fastest way to reach me, so send a DM and we can talk about your date.

about.title: ABOUT LAURA
paragraphs: Hi, I am Laura. I do traveling bridal hair, which means I come to you on your wedding or event day. No rushing across town in your gown. You get ready right where you are, and I take care of the hair.

I would love to hear about your day. Send me a DM on Instagram with your date and what you have in mind, and we can start planning. You can edit this whole story from the admin panel and make it sound like you.

guide.title: YOUR OFFER
guide.body: Use this space for a price list, a bridal package, or a booking form. Or hide it from the admin panel if you do not need it.

contact.title: Let's talk about your day
contact.intro: The best way to reach me is a DM on Instagram. Send your wedding or event date and a little about the look you want, and I will get back to you.
